## What this PR does

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Follows `AGENTS.md` conventions (tokens, `Au*` prefix, reuse > extend > create)
- [ ] If skills changed: edited in `skills/` (not generated trees) and ran `npm run skills:sync` + `skills:catalog`
- [ ] No hardcoded colors/sizes/raw SVGs introduced
